title: ADK-101: ADK Foundations
author: Google Cloud
description: Master the basics of Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK). Setup your local environment, install the CLI, configure agent.yaml, and run your first agent.

features.title: CLI Installation
features.description: Learn to install the ADK command line interface across native systems and sandboxed containers.

features.title: YAML Configurations
features.description: Master the schema design of agent.yaml to register tools, parameters, and memory parameters.

features.title: Tool Authoring
features.description: Write custom tools using Python or TypeScript decorators with strict parameter typing schemas.
